name: Okta Identity Provider Lifecycle Changes (30 days)
description: Detects identity provider lifecycle create/update/activate/deactivate/delete events in Okta, aligned with public Panther detections.
query: SELECT l.uuid AS id, l.actor_id, COALESCE(u.login, u.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS actor_name, l.target_id, l.target_type, l.event_type, l.outcome, l.published FROM okta_system_logs l LEFT JOIN okta_users u ON u.id = l.actor_id WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(l.event_type, '')) RLIKE '^system\.idp\.lifecycle\.(create|update|activate|deactivate|delete)$' AND LOWER(COALESCE(l.outcome, 'success')) IN ('success', 'allow', 'allowed') AND l.published >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Review identity provider lifecycle changes for authorization and validate downstream trust configurations for unauthorized additions or modifications.
